title: Kerberos Service Account Expired — Multiple Services Down

servicenow_seed.description: The print management service, backup agent, and an internal API gateway are all failing authentication. Event Viewer on APP-SRV-01 shows KRB5KDC_ERR_C_PRINCIPAL_UNKNOWN for svc-print@corp.local. The svc-print service account password expired at midnight. At least 4 downstream services depend on this account.

correct_steps: Validate caller and confirm affected server names, event IDs, and account name
Check Event Viewer for KRB5KDC_ERR_C_PRINCIPAL_UNKNOWN or 4771/4768 events
Set Impact 1 / Urgency 1 — multiple services dependent on one expired account
Document all downstream services affected in work notes
Link related service/backup tickets as child incidents or problem
Escalate to IAM for emergency service account password reset and remediation
Coordinate with App Support on service restart sequencing post-fix
rationale: An expired Kerberos service account causing multi-service failures is a Tier 3 / IAM incident. Manually resetting without IAM creates risk of mismatched SPNs and token reuse. Impact 1 is correct — production services are down.
